post.content:
Given a list of words, find all the Palindrome combinations by concatenating 2 strings. 

Ex: <cat, rat, mat, tab, bat, car, race> 
race + car -> Palindrome
tab + bat -> Palindrome

https://leetcode.com/problems/palindrome-pairs
Thanks for sharing, for anyone wondering, this is #336 - Palindrome Pairs.\n\nhttps://leetcode.com/problems/palindrome-pairs/description/
Super tough problem. Spent some time with it and then looked at the solution. Would be hard to envision a scenario where you can derive that logic in a 45min-1hr interview
